title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review November 2024
content:
Key Highlights:

Canada CFR:
In November, average bid and offer prices for Canada CFR CC3 and CC2 continued to decline, with CC3 bids down 47.22% and offers down 20.74%. CC2 bids fell 9.21%, while offers decreased 5.83%.
California LCFS:
  • Â CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price rose 8.48% MoMÂ in November.
  • Â Monthly credit transactions declined further by 99.37% MoM in November.
  • Â The average broker prices moved from $66.17/MT on 1st November to $77.38/MT on 29th November.
British Columbia LCFS:
  • Â BC LCFS monthly trading volume witnessed a 93.9% decline in October.
  • Â The average credit price under BC LCFS decline by 33.40% MoM, reaching $224.25.
Oregon CFP:
Â 
â€¢In November, OR CFP average credit prices Increased by 66.92% compared to October, reaching $48.49.
â€¢OR CFP trading activity in NovemberÂ saw a 101.7% increase, 423.00k credits were transferred.
Washington CFS:
  • Â Average credit prices in WA CFS delinked by 5.51% MoM.
  • Â For October, a total of185,961 credits were traded across 33Â transfers.
Â United States RFS:
  • Â In October, D5 RIN Prices increased while D3, D4 and D6 Prices decreased.Â 
  • RIN Generation increased by 2.44% and transaction volumes of RINs fell by 38.95% MoM.
author: Mansift Kaur
